free_text: Investigation of elastic scattering of 13.6 MeV
deuterons on medium-mass and heavy nuclei
English transl.of IZV,32,614,1968
method of measurement
Two scintillation spectrometers with the
energy resolution less than 3% were used. Crystal
with a 70 mg/cm2 thickness was used for the pulse
proportional to dE/dx and crystal of 700 mg/cm2
thickness was used for the pulse proportional to E.
The Au target of
0.15 mg/cm2 thickness was used.
Enrichment of isotope targets was more than 90%. The
targets were placed in the center of scattering chamber
with a diameter of 1.5 m.
SD: REL-REF corrected (JET,47,1583,1964 ->
JET,20,1062,1965; author's name). Title update
following presentation in BAS,32,564,1969.
The Mo target of 3.6+-0.9 mg/cm2 thickness was used.
Method of preparation: powder in glue.
Total error of relative measurements.
For some angles the total error was 7%.
Errors are due to the final angular
resolution of the spectrometer (0.5 degr.), averaging
of the results of several measurements, statistical
error and an error related to subtraction of cross
sections for complex targets.
Tbl.2
